title: Lua Parity Layer — Host-Brokered Consumption of Capabilities and Plugin Services — Design
summary: Specifies a single host-brokered mechanism for Lua plugins to consume host capabilities and plugin services via the same host.v1 gRPC contracts and BrokerProxy binary plugins use, replacing divergent hand-written Lua shims. Binds INV-PLUGIN-44/45/49 and closes bug holomush-eykuh.6, deferring migration of existing Lua plugins to a later sub-spec.
